mainQuestTheme: Turning images, memories, and inner visions into useful ideas without forcing them into premature certainty.

mainQuestContent.title: Foundation of the Image

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The idea is still a seed. The mind wants to plant it too fast.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: The image needs a stable place.
questBrief.mission: Hold the first image long enough to see what it is actually carrying.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Find the idea that keeps returning before it becomes a plan.
questBrief.livePrompt: What image keeps asking for space?

fieldBriefing.collapsedPreview: Do not rush the first image.
fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest begins with an image, memory, symbol, or idea before it has structure. The first task is not to explain it, but to give it enough stability to reveal what it wants to become.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Ideas lose power when they are forced into use too early. The foundation protects the image before the mind turns it into content.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You turn the image into a plan before you let it speak.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you converting imagination into output too quickly?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You harvest the idea before it has roots.
frictionSignals: turning every image into a task
abandoning ideas that are not immediately useful

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Give the image room in the body.
groundingProtocol: release the grip in your hands
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops reaching for output and lets the image stay present.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your belly hold the image without needing to use it?

unlockCondition.questKey: Receive the image → hold it without use → return only when its meaning stabilizes
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels quiet enough to let the idea remain unfinished.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Write the image exactly as it appeared, without explaining it.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: A seed image is not a finished message.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the idea stay alive before making it useful.

driftPattern: forcing ideas into output too early
discarding images that are not immediately practical

mainQuestContent.title: Natural Idea Transmission

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The idea lands when it is shared before it is overworked.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: The image wants a clean expression.
questBrief.mission: Let the idea move through simply before polishing it into performance.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice which image already knows how to say itself.
questBrief.livePrompt: What idea becomes clearer when spoken simply?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line carries an idea that can move naturally when it is not over-shaped. The image already has a direction; too much editing can flatten the living signal.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: The gift is clean transmission. The risk is overworking the idea until it loses its first charge.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep polishing the idea until the alive part disappears.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where did the first version have more life than the final one?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You improve the idea until it stops breathing.
frictionSignals: hiding the clean idea behind decoration

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body allows expression without squeezing the idea into perfection.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Does your throat stay open, or tighten around making it sound right?

unlockCondition.questKey: Catch the clean image → express the simplest version → stop before decoration takes over
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels open when the idea is spoken without being dressed up.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Say the first true version before editing it.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: The living idea does not need to be made clever.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Share the image while it still has breath.

driftPattern: polishing ideas until they lose force

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Some images only reveal themselves after they are tested.

questBrief.mission: Let failed expressions show which part of the idea is real.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Track what survives after the idea meets reality.
questBrief.livePrompt: What part of the idea keeps surviving the test?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line discovers which images are useful by trying them, revising them, and watching where they break. The image is not wrong because it changes; the change reveals its real shape.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: An untested idea can become fantasy. Testing turns imagination into usable insight.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep changing the idea, but avoid admitting what failed.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you revising without learning?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You call every revision growth instead of naming the miss.
frictionSignals: protecting the idea from honest feedback

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Let feedback land in the body.
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops defending the idea and starts receiving information.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your stomach stay soft while the idea is corrected?

unlockCondition.questKey: Test one expression → name what failed → keep only what survives contact
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels clearer after the false part is released.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Write one thing the test disproved before revising.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: A changed idea is only progress if the lesson is named.

mainQuestContent.title: Shared Story Field

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Ideas become useful when they can live inside a shared story.

questBrief.mission: Place the idea where others can recognize, respond, and add context.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Find the story that makes the idea shareable.
questBrief.livePrompt: Who needs to see this image?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line organizes ideas through relationship, story, and social memory. The image becomes more valuable when it can be received, discussed, and placed inside a shared frame.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Private imagination loops. Shared story turns the image into connection, language, and movement.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep the idea private so no one can change the story.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where would the idea improve if it entered conversation?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You protect the image until it has no relationship to anyone.
frictionSignals: avoiding the audience that could refine it
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where isolation makes the idea stale.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body becomes available for response without surrendering the image.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your chest stay open while the story changes?

unlockCondition.questKey: Name the image → place it in shared language → revise from real response
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body stays connected while the idea is received by others.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Share the unfinished story with one trusted person.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: An idea can belong to you and still need response.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the story meet another mind.

driftPattern: keeping ideas private until they lose relevance
protecting the story from relational feedback

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: People hear more in your idea than you actually said.

questBrief.mission: Clarify the vision without becoming responsible for every meaning others attach to it.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Separate the idea from what people want it to mean.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where is your vision being enlarged by others?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line can carry ideas that others amplify, idealize, or turn into a promise. The image becomes influential, but also vulnerable to being misunderstood or overclaimed.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Vision gains power here, but unclear boundaries can turn inspiration into expectation.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You let them build a future from an idea you never promised.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are others treating your image like a guarantee?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You enjoy the projection until it becomes a contract.
frictionSignals: avoiding correction because the attention feels useful
being pulled into promises you did not make
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where admiration turns into expectation.

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: Anchor the vision in the belly.
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stops rising into the projection and returns to the actual message.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are you speaking the idea, or carrying what they want it to become?

unlockCondition.questKey: State the vision → mark its limits → correct projection before it becomes expectation
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels centered when the idea is no larger than the truth.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Name what the idea is not before letting others run with it.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Inspiration is not consent to be misunderstood.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Separate the image from the projection.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The image is complete when it no longer needs to become anything.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: Some ideas are meant to remain seeds.
questBrief.mission: Discern which ideas should be shared, stored, released, or left untouched.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice which image is complete without becoming output.
questBrief.livePrompt: What idea does not need to be used?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line stands beyond immediate expression and sees the larger arc of ideas. Some images become stories, some become teachings, and some remain inner reference points rather than public material.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Forcing every idea into use cheapens the inner field. Discernment protects the difference between signal, story, memory, and message.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You call it wasted unless it becomes something visible.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you forcing an idea to justify its existence?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You turn sacred images into content just to prove they mattered.

groundingProtocol: relax the back of the neck
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body allows the image to remain inward without treating it as wasted.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your spine hold the idea without sending it outward?

unlockCondition.questKey: Receive the image → decide its role → share, store, or release without forcing output
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels complete even when nothing is produced.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Place the idea in an archive before deciding whether it belongs outside.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Not every vision is meant to become visible.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the image choose its form.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Foundation of the Image.

nodes.name: Idea Garden
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to work with images, ideas, and inner visions through foundation of the image.
nodes.effect: Imagination becomes useful without being forced into premature output.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice the difference between a living image and a finished message.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can hold, share, revise, or release an idea without draining its meaning.

nodes.name: Image Retention
nodes.description: You learn to recognize what kind of image or idea is actually present.
nodes.effect: Ideas stop being flattened into tasks before their role is known.
nodes.developmentCue: Identify the image before deciding what it is for.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can tell the difference between signal, story, memory, and message.

nodes.name: Inner Containment
nodes.description: The body learns to stay open while the idea is still becoming clear.
nodes.effect: Expression comes from steadiness instead of pressure to produce.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the body hold the image before the mind turns it into output.
nodes.masteryMarker: You remain physically quiet enough for the idea to keep its original signal.

nodes.name: Idea Foundation
nodes.description: The idea becomes easier to place when the relational or symbolic field is respected.
nodes.effect: Images can become language, story, or influence without losing their center.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the field show whether the idea wants response, privacy, or release.
nodes.masteryMarker: The idea can meet the world without being distorted by urgency.

nodes.name: Stable Imagination
nodes.description: The full path matures into stewardship of imagination without extraction.
nodes.effect: Ideas are used, shared, stored, or released according to their real role.
nodes.developmentCue: Honor the image before turning it into something visible.
nodes.masteryMarker: Imagination remains alive because it is not forced to prove itself.
